questionHtml: Suggest, giving a reason, the percentage of each isomer from the SN1 reaction.
markschemeHtml:
«around» 50% «each»

OR

similar/equal percentages

 

nucleophile can attack from either side «of the planar carbocation»

 

Accept “racemic mixture/racemate” for M1.

[2 marks]

meta.title: Suggest, giving a reason, the percentage of each isomer from the SN1 reaction.
